materializes: migration_assets/ and artifacts/migration/; deployment runtime files in the package are evidence-only and must not overwrite the working tree
notes: Set MIGRATION_ASSET_PACKAGE_PATH to a local tar.gz or MIGRATION_ASSET_PACKAGE_URL to a private authenticated object-store URL.
Do not publish this package to public GitHub Releases because it contains reconstructed user and business migration data.
The repository intentionally does not track generated migration asset payload files.
